2391180.name: Warlock's Gantlet
2391180.description:
Warlock's Gantlet is a sword & sorcery themed, hack'n slash FPS.

It stars you, as a warlock (wizard), on a trying adventure during which
you must face many enemies and explore several different locations to
reach your goal.

The game is very retro-flavoured, running on a custom-built,
software rendered engine, quite reminiscent of those found in early
to mid 90's 3D games.
2391180.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
